docket_entries.description: ORDER RE: CONTINUANCE ON THE COURTS MOTION

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUN-16-2026 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUN-16-2026 BY VISITING JUDGE CARRIE ZEPEDA. PLAINTIFF FELIX MACIAS-GARCIA IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT RODOLFO MACHADO IS NOT PRESENT. PROOF OF SERVICE ON FILE. PLAINTIFF EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: CARRIE ZEPEDA; CLERK: N.WEBB. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-16-2026 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MACIAS-GARCIA, FELIX J RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT RODOLFO MACHADO DBA TONY'S AUTOMOTIVE CENTER AKA TONY'S COLLISION CENTER $1,650.97 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,650.97, SEE ATTACHMENT STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $12,500.00 FILED BY MACIAS-GARCIA, FELIX J AS TO DEFENDANT RODOLFO MACHADO DBA TONY'S AUTOMOTIVE CENTER AKA TONY'S COLLISION CENTER ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-20-2026 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
REQUEST PENDING TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF MACIAS-GARCIA, FELIX J
ORDER GRANTING WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52 AS TO PLAINTIFF MACIAS-GARCIA, FELIX J

PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVICE FEE $50.00 (WAIVED) SERVED APR-02-2026, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON CORPORATION, NO SERVICE FEE AS TO DEFENDANT RODOLFO MACHADO DBA TONY'S AUTOMOTIVE CENTER AKA TONY'S COLLISION CENTER

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-20-2026 - CONTINUED FOR ADDITIONAL EVIDENCE TO JUN-16-2026 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF FELIX J MACIAS-GARCIA IS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF IS ASSISTED BY SPANISH LANGUAGE INTERPRETER MONICA HERNANDEZ. DEFENDANT RODOLFO MACHADO IS PRESENT. PROOF OF SERVICE ON FILE. THE COURT ORDERS THE PARTIES TO BE PRESENT AT 9:00 AM AND PLAINTIFF SHALL BRING THE TRUCK. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: CARRIE ZEPEDA; CLERK: N.WEBB. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
